data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the claim status workflow.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the claim status workflow (open, reviewing, approved, closed). However, there is no evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms the existence or functionality of this workflow. The absence of any related evidence indicates a gap in meeting the requirement, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: Claim status workflow (open, reviewing, approved, closed) is not validated or evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
